name: Admicom Oyj
summary: Admicom Oyj engages in the ERP management system development business in Finland. The company offers cloud based business management system solutions; accounting, payroll, and controller services; and training, and customer support services. It serves building engineers, and construction and industrial professionals. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Jyv√É¬§skyl√É¬§, Finland.
